privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task.json file contains no 'metadata' field and therefore no metadata claims to verify. The task uses synthetically generated data (a blank 800x600 pixel canvas created by ImageMagick in the setup_brush_task.sh script) rather than external datasets. All verification thresholds are hardcoded in verifier.py: paint detection threshold of 30 intensity units, minimum stroke size of 50 pixels, minimum coverage requirement of 1%, and a pass threshold of 75% score.
